text.title: spatial-interaction-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for spatial-interaction-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Requiring sustained arm extension above shoulder height for direct manipulation of frequently accessed objects.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Sustained arm elevation (gorilla arm) causes rapid muscle fatigue and is the primary cause of session abandonment in training and productivity XR applications.
